Off Calendar Dec-23-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Arlo Garcia Uriarte, Esq. (415) 596-1042 for Defendant and Moving Party Circle MacLeod
Allan J. Schwartz, Esq. (415) 441-5931 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Mission National Bank
RULING:
A R G U E D; the Court adopted its Tentative Ruling as modified: DEFENDANT CIRCLE MACLEOD'S Motion to Set Aside Entry Of Default: GRANTED upon payment by movant of $1,000.00 to Plaintiff's counsel on or before January 7, 2005. Answer may be served and filed upon payment; the answer shall contain a declaration under penalty of perjury that Defendant MacLeod has complied with the Court's order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/JT-X) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
